heading: Authority exceeded in executing warrant
label: 2234 Authority exceeded in executing warrant
text: Whoever, in executing a search warrant, willfully exceeds his authority or exercises it with unnecessary severity, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned not more than one year, or both.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 18, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 631 (, title XI, § 21, ).June 15, 1917, ch. 3040 Stat. 230Minor changes were made in phraseology.
Amendments2002— inserted “, or both” after “year”.Pub. L. 107–2731996— substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $1,000”.Pub. L. 104–294
